name: codex-windows-control-recovery
description: Diagnose and safely recover Codex Desktop Computer Use on Windows after app updates.

interface.shortDescription: Recover Computer Use without uninstalling Codex
interface.longDescription: A fail-closed diagnostic and recovery runbook for Codex Desktop Computer Use availability gates, writable runtimes, named pipes, live tool injection, and post-update verification on Windows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-windows-computer-use-recovery to diagnose and safely restore Codex Desktop Computer Use on Windows without uninstalling, resetting, or changing language settings.
